CONDITION_CATEGORY_19 
LABEL: 
Special Needs Plan (SNP) — Condition Category 19 (Cardiovascular Disorders, Chronic Heart Failure, 
and/or Diabetes) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies special needs plans (SNP) for cardiovascular disorders, chronic heart failure, 
and/or diabetes (Condition Category 19).
